meta.purpose: Credits and links for photographers who contribute images to PSBP species pages. To add a contributor, append one object to the photographers array. Leave inat or site as null if a person has no link of that kind; the page hides empty buttons automatically.

photographers.name: Helen Lewis
photographers.blurb: Bradenton-area wildlife photographer with a focus on Florida's coastal birds — herons, owls, and roseate spoonbills among them.

photographers.name: Rob Carr
photographers.blurb: A prolific iNaturalist observer who has documented dozens of the park's plant and animal species.
